from __future__ import annotations


def recursive_walk_over_untrusted_input_lacks_depth_limit_negative(
    node: dict[str, object], *, depth: int = 0, max_depth: int = 10
) -> int:
    if depth > max_depth:
        raise ValueError("depth limit exceeded")
    child = node.get("child")
    if isinstance(child, dict):
        return 1 + recursive_walk_over_untrusted_input_lacks_depth_limit_negative(
            child, depth=depth + 1, max_depth=max_depth
        )
    return 1
